assumptions.name: Unclassified query fallback base rate
assumptions.description: Fallback manual counterfactual duration for sessions whose query class is missing or classified as Other.
assumptions.source_note: Derived from classified traffic mix and called out as a high-leverage gap in the Time-Saves MVP packet.

sensitivity.note: Unclassified traffic is a large share of chat volume and materially moves totals.

caveats: Requires classification coverage improvement before customer-facing ROI language.

assumptions.name: No-signal chat quality multiplier
assumptions.description: Discount applied when chat quality cannot be directly inferred from explicit or implicit success signals.
assumptions.source_note: The MVP notes that no-signal chat runs are common and materially affect headline totals.

sensitivity.note: No-signal chat quality assumptions dominate uncertainty in session-level estimates.

caveats: Needs calibration or richer quality signals before external use.

assumptions.name: Blended hourly value rate
assumptions.description: Blended hourly dollar conversion used for account-level value translation.
assumptions.source_note: Used as a blunt average in the Time-Saves account-level ROI analysis.

sensitivity.note: Dollarized ROI scales directly with hourly-rate assumptions.

caveats: Customer-facing value should move toward persona-weighted rates.

assumptions.name: Productivity recapture discount
assumptions.description: Discount applied to gross time saved when translating to realized business value.
assumptions.value_label: Not applied in MVP; 50% benchmark scenario
assumptions.source_note: Forrester-style recapture can halve gross time-saved value; MVP does not apply it.

sensitivity.note: Recapture materially changes value-to-cost and payback claims.

caveats: Must be selected and approved before ROI/payback language is customer-facing.

assumptions.name: Current measured-surface coverage
assumptions.description: Current coverage caveat for Time-Saves MVP surfaces versus all Glean value surfaces.
assumptions.value_label: UI Chat, UI Search, and AI Answers covered; Agents/MCP/API surfaces incomplete
assumptions.source_note: The MVP explicitly excludes Agents, MCP, APIs, Gleanbot, Autocomplete, and several other surfaces.

sensitivity.note: Coverage affects whether claims describe covered surfaces or all Glean.

caveats: Language must say covered surfaces, not all Glean usage.

assumptions.name: ARR as customer cost proxy
assumptions.description: ARR is used as a proxy denominator for account-level value-to-cost analysis.
assumptions.source_note: The packet notes ARR is not a full cost model and excludes consumption or marginal costs.

sensitivity.note: Useful for directional account review but incomplete for true ROI.

caveats: Not sufficient for customer-facing ROI certification.

assumptions.name: Known-item UI search anchor
assumptions.description: Manual counterfactual duration for simple known-item or navigational enterprise search.
assumptions.source_note: Supported by intranet usability and refinding studies in the Base Rate Evidence Review.

sensitivity.note: Lower sensitivity than chat base-rate fallback assumptions.

caveats: Use only for known-item search slices, not blended or research-heavy search.
